name: io.github.alxvasilevvv/nectarin-intelligence-worker
title: NECTARIN Intelligence
description: RU/CIS AI marketing intelligence agent — 51 MCP tools incl. one-call strategy orchestration, a competitive response war-game simulator (competitive_response), a media delivery quality scorer (media_quality_score), a Share-of-Voice / ESOV growth tracker (sov_tracker), a geo-holdout incrementality test tool (geo_holdout), a weekly media flowchart/flighting planner (media_flowchart), a creative production budget & timeline estimator (production_estimator), an omnichannel deduplicated reach estimator (channel_overlap), a brand-lift study calculator (brand_lift), an OLV/display reach & frequency planner (reach_frequency), an influencer/KOL roster evaluator & mix optimizer with fraud flags (influencer_planner), a profit-maximizing price optimizer with demand elasticity (price_optimizer), a creative burnout/fatigue detector (creative_fatigue), an executive one-pager that orchestrates audit + upside (board_report), a promo/discount P&L & break-even calculator (promo_planner), a what-if budget scenario comparator with ROI ranking (scenario_planner), a senior account health audit with prioritized action plan (marketing_audit), a phased go-to-market roadmap with seasonally-weighted weekly budget pacing (gtm_calendar), a conversion-maximizing budget optimizer, a marketing mix model (MMM-lite) with adstock + saturation, channel saturation / diminishing-returns response curves, RU ad-law compliance review (ФЗ-38/ОРД), A/B test power analysis, unit-economics (LTV/CAC), full-funnel modeling, seasonality forecasting, creative scoring & multi-variant generation, anomaly detection, cohort LTV, UTM builder, budget pacing, multi-touch attribution, bid simulation, deck export and CIS localization: media planning, RU benchmarks, audience insights, competitor & GEO/AEO scans, ROI/value forecasting, creative briefs and lead/funnel helpers. KV-cached LLM narrative, global rate limiting, per-tenant real-data layering (X-Tenant-Id), tool annotations, a live catalog resource, argument autocompletion and opt-in SSE. Orchestrator-worker server on Cloudflare Workers.
